<noinclude>
This is the '''Property''' template. It is used for all property/building pages in the wiki.

To create a new property page, use [[Form:Property]].

'''Parameters:'''
* Current Address - The current street address (canonical form)
* APN - Assessor's Parcel Number
* Block Number - City block number
* Lot Number - Lot number within block
* Year Built - Year of original construction
* Year Built Approximate - Whether the year built is approximate (Yes/No)
* Architectural Style - Architectural style (e.g., Italianate, Greek Revival)
* Stories - Number of stories
* Construction Material - Primary construction material (wood, brick, etc.)
* Historic Status - Contributor, Landmark, Non-Contributor, or Not Surveyed
* Current Use - Current building use
* Original Use - Original building use
* Builder - Builder name (links to Person page)
* Architect - Architect name (links to Person page)
* Latitude - Geographic latitude (WGS84)
* Longitude - Geographic longitude (WGS84)
* Survey Date - Date of most recent professional survey
* Data Confidence - High, Medium, Low, or Stub

[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude><includeonly>__NOTOC__
{| class="wikitable" style="float:right; margin-left:1em; width:300px;"
|+ style="font-size:1.1em; font-weight:bold;" | Property Information
|-
! Current Address
| [[Current Address::{{{Current Address|}}}]]
{{#if:{{{APN|}}}|{{!}}-
! APN
{{!}} [[APN::{{{APN|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Block Number|}}}|{{!}}-
! Block
{{!}} [[Block Number::{{{Block Number|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Lot Number|}}}|{{!}}-
! Lot
{{!}} [[Lot Number::{{{Lot Number|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Year Built|}}}|{{!}}-
! Year Built
{{!}} [[Year Built::{{{Year Built|}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{Year Built Approximate|}}}|Yes| (approx.)}}}}
{{#if:{{{Architectural Style|}}}|{{!}}-
! Style
{{!}} [[Architectural Style::{{{Architectural Style|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Stories|}}}|{{!}}-
! Stories
{{!}} [[Stories::{{{Stories|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Construction Material|}}}|{{!}}-
! Material
{{!}} [[Construction Material::{{{Construction Material|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Historic Status|}}}|{{!}}-
! Historic Status
{{!}} [[Historic Status::{{{Historic Status|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Current Use|}}}|{{!}}-
! Current Use
{{!}} [[Current Use::{{{Current Use|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Original Use|}}}|{{!}}-
! Original Use
{{!}} [[Original Use::{{{Original Use|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Builder|}}}|{{!}}-
! Builder
{{!}} [[Builder::{{{Builder|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Architect|}}}|{{!}}-
! Architect
{{!}} [[Architect::{{{Architect|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Survey Date|}}}|{{!}}-
! Survey Date
{{!}} [[Survey Date::{{{Survey Date|}}}]]}}
|-
! Data Confidence
| [[Data Confidence::{{{Data Confidence|Stub}}}]]
|}

{{#if:{{{Latitude|}}}{{{Longitude|}}}|{{#display_map:{{{Latitude|38.049}}},{{{Longitude|-122.159}}}~{{{Current Address|}}}|zoom=17|service=leaflet|height=200px|width=300px}}
[[Has coordinates::{{#coordinates:{{{Latitude|}}}|{{{Longitude|}}}}}]]}}

{{#ifeq:{{{Year Built Approximate|}}}|Yes|[[Year Built Approximate::Yes]]|}}

{{#if:{{{Year Built|}}}|
{{#ifexpr:{{{Year Built}}} < 1860|[[Category:Built 1847-1859]]|
{{#ifexpr:{{{Year Built}}} < 1870|[[Category:Built 1860-1869]]|
{{#ifexpr:{{{Year Built}}} < 1880|[[Category:Built 1870-1879]]|
{{#ifexpr:{{{Year Built}}} < 1890|[[Category:Built 1880-1889]]|
{{#ifexpr:{{{Year Built}}} < 1900|[[Category:Built 1890-1899]]|
{{#ifexpr:{{{Year Built}}} < 1910|[[Category:Built 1900-1909]]|
{{#ifexpr:{{{Year Built}}} < 1920|[[Category:Built 1910-1919]]|
{{#ifexpr:{{{Year Built}}} < 1930|[[Category:Built 1920-1929]]|
{{#ifexpr:{{{Year Built}}} < 1940|[[Category:Built 1930-1939]]|
{{#ifexpr:{{{Year Built}}} < 1950|[[Category:Built 1940-1949]]|
{{#ifexpr:{{{Year Built}}} < 1960|[[Category:Built 1950-1959]]|
{{#ifexpr:{{{Year Built}}} < 1970|[[Category:Built 1960-1969]]|
[[Category:Built 1970-Present]]
}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}
}}

{{#ifeq:{{{Historic Status|}}}|Landmark|[[Category:Landmarks]]|
{{#ifeq:{{{Historic Status|}}}|Contributor|[[Category:Contributors]]|
{{#ifeq:{{{Historic Status|}}}|Non-Contributor|[[Category:Non-Contributors]]|
[[Category:Not Surveyed]]
}}}}}}

{{#ifeq:{{{Data Confidence|Stub}}}|Stub|[[Category:Stub Pages]]|}}
{{#if:{{{Architectural Style|}}}|[[Category:{{PAGENAME}} Style]]|}}

[[Category:Properties]]
</includeonly>
